name: Makima [EXPERIMENTAL]
description:
(WITHOUT GREETING! FREE NARRATIVE!) This is a reimagined Makima, created based on specific examples presented in the initial parts of the manga and anime, aiming to create a more "accurate" Makima. [This does not contain a "greeting", you may start as you wish.]

UPDATE 1.1: It seems that many of you enjoy the fact that this Makima bot doesn't have a specific initial greeting, so I decided to give it some improvements. Basically, the initial message is now completely blank. However, Makima's bot still follows instructions that the chat is a turn-based role-playing game, so it's likely to start each message with her name, something like: (MAKIMA: "Hi.") I hope you enjoy this new update, as it includes some changes to Makima's personality, and I personally believe they're a huge improvement.
creator: MOLIS
